riskFloorReasons: new capability: new exported class / subsystem added

causalAutopsy.notes: Recovery began only after a context-wall failure or provider compaction event. Long unattended autonomous runs therefore had no early, idle-safe intervention even though Claude exposed grounded remaining-context telemetry in the pane.

classClosure.failureClass: Autonomous sessions can reach the context wall despite exposing a safe pre-wall signal.
classClosure.closure: The sentinel is structurally dark, dry-run first, autonomous-and-Claude-only, thresholded at 85% used, fail-closed on indeterminate work state, and cooldown bounded. Unit tests pin every gate and the server wiring.
